top_findings.summary: The skill requests Bash tool access, which allows execution of arbitrary system commands. For a meeting summary skill that primarily processes text transcripts and uses an external AI API (OpenAI), Bash access is excessive and unrelated to its core functionality of generating summaries, action items, and decisions. This could enable unrelated actions like accessing sensitive system files or performing unauthorized operations, violating the principle of least privilege. Additionally, while the skill uses an OpenAI API key (necessary for AI processing), the inclusion of Bash tool permission is not justified for the stated purpose.
